About:

I walk you through my complete TikTok Shop tutorial for beginners in 2026, showing exactly how I set up a TikTok Shop seller account, research winning products, and list them step-by-step. In this video, I share my screen the entire time so you can follow along as I navigate TikTok Shop Seller Center and explain how everything actually works for real sellers.

• TikTok Shop for beginners overview – how TikTok Shop works in 2026 and why I think it’s a huge ecommerce opportunity

• TikTok Shop Seller Center walkthrough – I click through the dashboard, explain the menus, and show you how I set everything up

• TikTok Shop product research – how I use Product Opportunities, “Most-wanted products,” keywords, and trends to find viral product ideas

• Adding products to TikTok Shop – step-by-step listing setup, product titles, attributes, and using AI to optimize names and descriptions

• GTIN/UPC and compliance – when you need product identifiers, how I handle barcodes, dangerous goods questions, weight, size, and shipping details

• Shipping & fulfillment options – the pros and cons of self-fulfillment, 3PL, and Fulfilled by TikTok (FBT), and when I’d pick each one

• TikTok Shop affiliate program – how I find creators, send free products, set conditions, and get affiliates to promote my listings

• Campaigns & events – how I look at Deals for You Days, livestream events, and short video challenges to get more traffic and sales

• Storefront design – how I customize my TikTok Shop logo, header, layout, and collections to make my shop look professional

• Analytics, account health & automation – the key metrics I track, how I monitor Account Health Rating, and the automated reminders that help recover sales

By the end, you’ll see exactly how I set up TikTok Shop from scratch, research products, list them correctly, and use TikTok Shop’s built-in tools to grow an ecommerce business and make money on TikTok in 2026.
